name: Vanita Prakash Kandhari
review: Whenever I go to India, I make sure that I buy clothing from them. They have amazing varieties of clothing with excellent quality materials at a reasonable price. Another good thing about them is that I don't need to worry about any alterations as they take care of it and try to fix it on the spot. All of their staff and the owner are very helpful. Overall, they have an excellent customer service with best quality clothing.
